overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City's neon-lit alleyways and markets. The player traverses a covered market area with industrial pipes, turns through graffiti-covered back alleys, and ascends a long illuminated staircase to an upper level. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements, neon signage, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with industrial pipes and food stalls

events.description: passing by MARK 24 food stall with bright yellow signage
pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered market alley lined with neon advertisements and industrial pipes

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the MARK 24 stall
pedestrian with glowing umbrella walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial pipes with yellow lighting running along the right wall
food stall with bright yellow MARK 24 neon signage and menu displays
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the left wall showing product commercials
hanging red paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling structure
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market alley characteristic of Night City, with large yellow-lit industrial pipes dominating the right side and digital billboards lining the left. The player walks past the MARK 24 food stall and various neon signs while navigating around trash piles and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered back alley with debris and curved architecture

events.description: turning left from market alley into narrower passage with heavy graffiti
passing character with glowing purple umbrella walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrower back alley covered in colorful graffiti and littered with debris

notable_agents.action: character holding glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti including large red NO GUN text
curved building facade with large wraparound illuminated advertisements
scattered cardboard boxes and garbage littering the ground

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a grittier back alley where the walls are covered in vibrant graffiti including prominent NO GUN and YOUR CLAN tags. A character with a glowing purple umbrella passes by as the player navigates around trash and debris toward a curved building with large digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian underpass with warning signage

events.description: entering passage with prominent purple neon warning signs and cyan lighting
slowing down as approaching the base of a large staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage illuminated by purple and cyan neon lights toward a staircase

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: large purple illuminated billboard displaying WARNING text in bright neon
vertical cyan neon light strips and pillars along the left wall
wide concrete staircase with illuminated edges leading upward to upper level

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrower passage dominated by a large purple WARNING billboard and cyan neon lighting. The environment shifts to a more industrial underpass with some overgrown vegetation on the left, leading toward a wide concrete staircase visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated concrete stairwell ascending between buildings

events.description: beginning to ascend the long staircase with orange illuminated edges
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper covered concourse

agents.ego_description: climbing a long concrete staircase with orange LED strips along the edges, transitioning to an upper level

entered.detail: metal walkway bridge crossing above the stairwell connecting buildings
large colorful graffiti mural of a Japanese demon mask on the right wall
covered plaza area with concrete architecture at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a long concrete staircase illuminated by bright orange LED strips along the edges. The walls feature prominent graffiti including a large demon face mural. After climbing, the player reaches the top where an overhead bridge spans the stairwell and enters a covered upper concourse with different lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense urban corridor that transforms from a crowded commercial market into a gritty industrial ascent. It begins in a covered alleyway dominated by yellow-lit industrial pipes and digital billboards, moving past food stalls and pedestrians amidst scattered trash. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts into a grittier back alley defined by vibrant graffiti and the passing glow of a purple umbrella before curving toward a series of large digital advertisements. The scene then narrows into a cyan-lit industrial underpass marked by a purple warning billboard and patches of overgrown vegetation, which leads the way toward a distant concrete structure. Finally, the camera ascends a long staircase illuminated by bright orange LED strips and demon murals, climbing upward until it reaches a covered upper concourse beneath an overhead bridge.
